title: Luffy Forces the Final Fight
description: On pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part focuses on the royal tomb and the poneglyph. Robin and Crocodile reach Alabasta’s hidden history while Luffy pushes back into the fight, refusing to let the Warlord bury Vivi’s country.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Royal Tomb and the Poneglyph sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Crocodile, Nico Robin, Luffy, King Cobra, Vivi.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: towards the royal crypt that way....!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Maybe I'm just a bit tired...

summary: Robin and Crocodile reach Alabasta’s hidden history while Luffy pushes back into the fight, refusing to let the Warlord bury Vivi’s country.
